title: limeum obovatum
intro: Limeum obovatum is a plant species in the family Limoniaceae, commonly known as a type of sedge, that is native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. Limeum obovatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
